rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that x[n * 10000] accesses out of bounds for any n >= 1 due to the multiplier 10000.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed local fix changes the loop range but does not address the index expression x[n * 10000], which is the proximate cause of the out-of-bounds access.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using std::array<int, 5> with bounds-checked access, which satisfies the global_fix criterion.
